result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text - text
LINE 3:        AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) A...
                                                  ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(*) AS total_cases_handled,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case"
WHERE createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND createddate < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND id NOT IN (
      SELECT ch.caseid__c
      FROM casehistory__c ch
      WHERE ch.field__c = 'OwnerId'
        AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
        AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  )
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(*) AS total_cases_handled,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case"
WHERE createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND createddate < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND id NOT IN (
      SELECT ch.caseid__c
      FROM casehistory__c ch
      WHERE ch.field__c = 'OwnerId'
        AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
        AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  )
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(*) AS total_cases_handled,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((closeddate::timestamp) - (createddate::timestamp)))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case"
WHERE createddate::date >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND createddate::date < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND id NOT IN (
      SELECT ch.caseid__c
      FROM casehistory__c ch
      WHERE ch.field__c = 'OwnerId'
        AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
        AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  )
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(*) AS total_cases_handled,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((closeddate::timestamp) - (createddate::timestamp)))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case"
WHERE createddate::date >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND createddate::date < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND id NOT IN (
      SELECT ch.caseid__c
      FROM casehistory__c ch
      WHERE ch.field__c = 'OwnerId'
        AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
        AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  )
GROUP BY ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(*) AS total_cases_handled,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((c.closeddate::timestamp) - (c.createddate::timestamp)))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case" c
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT caseid__c
    FROM casehistory__c
    WHERE field__c = 'OwnerId'
      AND oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
      AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
) ch ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
WHERE c.createddate::date >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND c.createddate::date < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND ch.caseid__c IS NULL
GROUP BY c.ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id,
       COUNT(*) AS total_cases_handled,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((c.closeddate::timestamp) - (c.createddate::timestamp)))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
FROM "Case" c
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT caseid__c
    FROM casehistory__c
    WHERE field__c = 'OwnerId'
      AND oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
      AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
) ch ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
WHERE c.createddate::date >= DATE '2023-05-02'
  AND c.createddate::date < DATE '2023-09-03'
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND ch.caseid__c IS NULL
GROUP BY c.ownerid
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

result.preview: "No agent in the data meets all of the specified criteria (having processed more than one non-transferred case that both opened and closed within the past four months). As a result, there is no agent Id to return for this query."
